---
title: "NNodely: An Open Framework for Model-Structured Neural Networks in Robotics"
author:
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
  - "Mattia Piccinini"
publication: "Technical University of Munich & University of Trento (2025)"
type: presentation
categories:
  - "Presentations"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source: 
url_preprint: 
journ: "Ekumen Robotics Software Company, Germany"
venue: "Ekumen Robotics Software Company, Germany"
year: 2025
video: mz70WepnwMM
doi: ""
pdf: presentation.pdf
pub_number: 30
order: -30
image: slide.png
---

## Summary

Presentation by **Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini** and **Mattia Piccinini** **University of Trento & Technical University of Munich** at **Ekumen Robotics Software Company, Germany** (2025). The talk *NNodely: An Open Framework for Model-Structured Neural Networks in Robotics* presents the open **nnodely** framework, contrasts black-box deep learning with physics-guided MSNNs, and discusses robotic use cases and deployment.

## Video {#video}

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mz70WepnwMM >}}

::: {.presentation-preview}
![](slide.png){fig-alt="First slide: NNodely open framework for MSNNs in robotics" width=95%}
:::
